name: Toll House Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine butter, sugar, and nuts. Spoon into a well-greased and floured 10-inch fluted bundt pan. Chill while preparing the batter.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
4. In a measuring cup, add vinegar and fill to 1 cup line with milk. Set aside.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy (3-5 minutes).
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Turn the mixer to low speed. Gradually add flour mixture, alternating with milk mixture. Gently fold in chocolate chips.
8. Pour batter into the prepared bundt pan.
9. Bake for 50 minutes.
10. Loosen edges of cake with a spatula and invert onto a cooling rack. Cool completely.
